textByHash.5ac6dbfb08918d4d59fc3d782feb785f574bc576: It's a good job you showed up when you did. Those mercenaries nearly had us done for!
textByHash.0ed95a2e8b84222922da0068edd4cce365a92f1c: So I take it you're ? I'm Idria. I've heard a lot about you. Much of it good... though it remains to be seen if that's enough to rectify your actions in stealing the Staff of Armadyl from us.
textByHash.94b9889deb98286e438148a04a1426e8a9213f17: It very much does. It's a rare trait to be able to admit a mistake and work to fix it, though truth be told, it seems likely that Lucien would have obtained the Staff no matter what.
textByHash.51cd034bdc7fb46a055bbf38c0d4b975ba5cc841: But anyway, that's the past. We must focus on the future, and on ensuring said future is free of Lucien.
textByHash.43c0a5b99b416bf1f839f199fcbac664a5f98b85: So I take it you're ? I've heard a lot about you. It's a pleasure to finally meet you. I'm Idria.
textByHash.01c295777780d679e6cb1933c11a942bf7ab8d1c: If Thaerisk sent you, I'm guessing you're more up to speed on the current state of things than I am. What can you tell me?
textByHash.256a609cf1e723b30b6e910c2973b8f915481d72: Good. The more allies we have, the better. Now, given that Lucien is quite keen to see us dead, we shouldn't waste any more time here. I'll head to the White Knights' Castle as quick as possible.
textByHash.a2bfc463a0c1973f3e299ef2137edde9a371af2f: Perhaps it would be best if we kept theology out of this for now. While I'm sure all of us here would love to debate our differing viewpoints, we need to keep our focus on Lucien.
textByHash.7b80ee48ce2f05bf97aed505ede3cf285ab406df: What could be more powerful than the Staff?
textByHash.7537c1c9beefedb002d30d9a6ce93b4a041d187b: You speak like you have first-hand experience. Surely you have not encountered this artefact?
textByHash.115f884c2ca5d7f43c9c6919f972ba84f6a35b8a: We must find Lucien and stop him by any means necessary.
textByHash.bbb1d44577dc7ed0e4524c9859c1541e339a1864: I suspect he's somewhere in the Wilderness. Our informants believe he has been raising an undead army there at a concerning speed. It will likely rival the zombie armies of Zemouregal before long.
textByHash.7d159dfd1b64731ac54845366df94f16ecc277bc: It might require quite the interrogation to make one of Lucien's dogs talk.
textByHash.ceadfa5efca0d6a9d41cab28e0452b307b9e0c7e: That's all well and good, but how are we going to capture one of these spies?
textByHash.976e36e97d74e163c1b7e9dd85352020b63529d6: Hello. How are things going with that spy?
textByHash.b183d19342b60f2041852973fddfe4e79c541366: Well if you need anything, just talk to Akrisae.
textByHash.c3d94414248071347cd80c2d49fca062bd92e026: Excellent work! You should let Akrisae know.
textByHash.9eec39c175e569ebd96bb22ec301429b77f48a13: To be honest, I'd prefer if you didn't. In our line of work, it is sometimes better not to give too much information away, especially when dealing with a threat like Lucien.
textByHash.83b65fc5d1d3a904d0173baa7f061e80bae5f393: If you're worried about my ability to work with you and the others, I promise you have nothing to worry about. Now, let us discuss something else.
textByHash.d9159bb98effc7227494574f43030877b7a07348: I must admit, we had always wondered if the Staff of Armadyl was truly one of a kind, or if there might in fact be other artefacts out there of a similar power.
textByHash.8589f27a5f203b43c3f835632d204b600e0f340c: However, until now, it was all just speculation. We'd never heard of this Stone before, so to be honest, I couldn't really tell you a thing about it.
textByHash.f95e3634f216ba8f2f84d9a9e82e934e2434d95c: To think that it was out there for all this time... It worries me. It makes me question what else we don't know.
textByHash.8546e6e45830c830fa2873ec795e9bcf3d6668a1: He's a Saradominist through and through.
textByHash.ac3ec89d4779ebdb1611b032ecef54dce07922c7: Not necessarily. I'd say Saradominist and Armadylean beliefs are more aligned than those of most gods.
textByHash.a9f5c633fcd9fdec5168b046e100cfc04372adca: Still, I find Saradominists can be somewhat stubborn and unwilling to compromise. That could be a problem. If this alliance is to work, we'll need to set aside our egos.
textByHash.a68ac5e49e0679552e60f244acee31c69e9034c1: I find that too many Guthixians are idealists. They prefer to imagine a perfect world rather than accept the one we currently live in.
textByHash.967d6c7f33afdf0dd30c236a2f665508fd948026: I know all too well the danger of that mindset. Our order was once the same, and we lost the Staff of Armadyl as a result.
textByHash.c7cbe9e7a34a3f8ab0680230f5ae75f7e4cd2960: Thaerisk on the other hand... He seems to understand that only through action can we ensure the safety of this world. We need more people like him.
textByHash.e05455bd082bf3de9d872cc4149b01620f3f4f9b: I thought we agreed to keep theology out of this? Besides, I'd say this work was exclusively 's doing.
textByHash.ff60fad921911aaef6bdd77c9ba97f99fb007375: We cannot afford to make these mistakes. The spy should have been restrained.
textByHash.e8a820afb357cbe72788d5bbe282af053b5fc3b7: Well if you need anything, just talk to Thaerisk.
textByHash.1addc5f60a8dab3a22687eb82bc15e8813c46af1: Ah, there you are. I have a new task for you.
textByHash.b7e9010f2b940bbd2dee46d2f5b4683d9ce3ab02: Provided all goes well with this replacement truth serum, we should soon know Lucien's location. However, given he now has the Staff of Armadyl, taking him on is not going to be easy.
textByHash.f184d7a9fb5539d9d3d2eeb5dbddb8b17f47e21d: Thanks to our alliance, we can now bring a sizable force to bear. However, for Lucien himself, we require individuals with more specialised skills.
textByHash.48b9af7b142ba218c919aa552d30e2233fa1b149: With that in mind, we're looking to recruit a group of heroes to form a small task force. They will be the ones to deal with Lucien.
textByHash.c6a7b3fbf4b9c9552700f0e7988eaa3f194db65d: We do. Your task is to seek out and recruit three legendary Slayer Masters: Turael, Mazchna and Duradel. Alongside them, we'd also like you to recruit a great warrior called Cyrisus.
textByHash.cb943e60d3bfba4abc650e3d378b65f06420c05a: Oh, so you're already acquainted? That should make things easier as we've actually found it quite hard to locate him. He always seems to be on the move.
textByHash.a2731378e43f2c5091b296671c3cfe86e66e67e7: I have heard that the elusive Moon Clan have methods for contacting people across great distances. Perhaps that might allow you to easily reach out to Cyrisus and the others.
textByHash.c4fe425546044d4a4e79fe1a6c5c7fefd106d62c: They are not the kind of people to let evil thrive. That is why we picked them.
textByHash.87883acd2049aca68560eedda367589d5db187ae: You should check in with Thaerisk. Getting that truth serum sorted is our next priority.
textByHash.6746e449a3d6b33d2578ae7fa8cff33f47758dc1: Well if you need any help with it, just talk to Thaerisk.
textByHash.7044777f6536a545e33bae49f389ca1748db186b: Perfect! Let's get it administered and see what this spy knows.
textByHash.ebcd0d0b8797ef89ddce60ced4bed48ade888fe3: Well if needed, I'm sure Akrisae will be able to help you with that.
textByHash.4232a05be89710dd02a55eb60171fd85730bb78a: True, but we'll just have to work with what we've got. You said the spy gave you a description?
textByHash.004936ab152db71dc14f0fd2fb959efe4316561b: Yes, I reckon we can work with this. I'll arrange for some wanted posters to be put up.
textByHash.3e57b93478c7991782af86fa74d7b9ba9b4530a3: We have three more heroes that we'd like you to recruit to our cause.
textByHash.13156547d6d789b1d8c1592ff4b8f86b844713c5: Ghommal, Sloane and Harrallak. All three are members of the Warriors' Guild. Given their nature, we have no doubt they'll agree to join us once you explain the situation.
textByHash.b6a3a6f77bc8dfca0f7348f198f4fb2c362d469c: Hello again. Have you managed to recruit those heroes yet?
textByHash.8bdcd7dbfada9089945c7ecc411d3ed3693042de: Remember, you're aiming to convince Ghommal, Sloane and Harrallak to join us. All three are members of the Warriors' Guild.
textByHash.0b0c36fe2797ce89796c7ff66d255da5cdcf95e6: Hello again. Good work recruiting those heroes. I reckon our task force is now complete.
textByHash.2a20de95e2809b3da406aa90a008fdafe8f5d2ef: You should speak to Akrisae. There has been a development that he can fill you in on.
textByHash.c4ce345a95691320bf3a1358e90aa68ea3e87146: Not knowingly perhaps, but who's to say he knows Lucien's true ambition.
textByHash.5416a23e353f5b7dbe95141212275f2aac03e1b4: Hello there. How goes the hunt for the Dark Squall?
textByHash.34bfd7d334ad7bef47f1f8bae08cce653f2576a4: Well if you need any help, just speak to Akrisae.
textByHash.06f042d8906e6190ae7e3887c8c14e2296d30f1b: It's starting to seem like Lucien's allied with more Zamorakian organisations than he hasn't!
textByHash.0ac731a708e7c9b757e20ce95719cc9c7f5a76e4: Hello there. How goes the hunt for Lucien?
textByHash.e94e8dca27154ddaaa6ec25f4861ca72130de250: Don't worry, the heroes will be keeping an eye on things from a distance. They'll move in as soon as they have a positive sighting.
textByHash.67a405f5be1d54d7d7c8da1bbf1da775ad9ab252: Thank goodness you're back. When Mazchna reported in, we feared the worst!
textByHash.eab309e6c95028eda676b8fa6bb7ab998d6abe41: But what can we do? It seems we already lack the ability to stand against Lucien, and he doesn't even have the Stone yet! With it...
textByHash.b8be4aedbddb141cc85bc3d096c00bc99b1acb26: Lumbridge Swamp? There's nothing of value there, is there?
textByHash.58f8164fd1b435414d8657fe92eb4c3db57687a2: It's a risky plan, but I suspect it's the only one we've got.
textByHash.79101c535c7107ff31021ea67508a97201b4bcb4: Hello there. Any luck with Movario?
textByHash.86dc43e210b6775170d3e982c8b829e826b58774: According to Akrisae, he was last seen somewhere in the Lumbridge Swamp Caves, in a large cavern filled with mysterious floating lights.
textByHash.2c3d6129edc55b2daaa5d4bcc8332e5299c9c67f: If you disguise yourself as the Dark Squall, you'll hopefully be able to convince him you're working with him.
textByHash.580d7868562937b913aaddc70caad3036d283c82: I know how you feel, but the sacrifices we make... it's never for nothing. They were willing to stand against a great evil so that the world might be safe.
textByHash.dee31666e789c5b8c6de5b1d4929e8544abcfc55: That's how I know that Lucien will never win. We fight for something that he will never understand, and we do so no matter the chance of success.
textByHash.5c3067cf3d66a2bdcbd2a8baab00a6eae6b4cd84: Because of that, our sacrifices will always have far more meaning than anything he stands for.
textByHash.950f247d0dbd47e7ea6849062305a0f151631ba7: Well then you'd better get back there. If Movario is close to finding the Stone, then we need to find it first.
textByHash.a1b918141e2efaa42a70b6593249c35cabef683d: Well then you need to get back there now and make sure the Stone is safe! I have a party that's nearly ready to support you. We will join you as soon as we can.
textByHash.f7564b82abe8405d5f0d9a4edfbe31eba770a8fe: Blessed Armadyl, that was incredible! The Stone must have augmented your strengths. I've never seen anything like it!
textByHash.a1ca9ce7c146511247e5e6aa8467cfb8dcfb92d1: Now, we'd better get back to Falador. Do you want me to teleport you there?
textByHash.240003ece81b8bb666b871b10d471bf47fc2e5ff: Very well. I'll see you back there.
textByHash.682a8fb44cd08bfd591eec64b5f506e179043f32: That's something he'll never have a chance to do. Yes, this is a dark day, but I don't intend to give up, and I'm sure none of you do either.
textByHash.95e4cae81096ed1592c188e000bfadf8cb301d75: , you've helped forge an alliance between the Temple Knights, Crux Eqal and the Guardians of Armadyl. Three very different groups, all fighting for the common good.
textByHash.68e24737c1a14a343f1fb56128eb373d2395f743: We must build on that. We will strengthen our forces, and find new allies to join our cause. When Lucien dares to rear his head again, we'll be ready.
textByHash.f4d4696374d5c636b58478b0c8127078bedda067: Don't worry. When the time is right, you'll be the first to know. I promise you, we will find Lucien. Together, we will stop him.
textByHash.5d61210b44b8760c96ad64dfe708618a1f86eeb0: We're still trying to work out what Lucien's next move is, but so far everything has been quiet.
textByHash.c0699ec2790f03532161fa29d79c4ddede5a9ab7: It's hard to say. He has the Stone of Jas and the Staff of Armadyl now. That should give him everything he needs to follow in Zamorak's footsteps, but for whatever reason, he's chosen not to act yet.
textByHash.a0aee9742574fdaf41b4c3e22535137630563cba: Not really at this point, but we'll be sure to let you know the moment he dares try anything. In the meantime, you might want to return to that temple beneath Lumbridge.
textByHash.fe52775553dfd7f2f64f3d544bea5e8bd258c384: It seems the magics Lucien used down there were far more than just a single summoning spell. The area has been permanently desecrated by those horrifying demons.
textByHash.12391327fa3e26f0513a0814da1b0a01367cf13b: If you were looking for some way of keeping Lucien and his forces in check, killing a few of those demons wouldn't be a bad idea.
